description: Style NoteWith a minimalistic and simple design, this black wallet by peter england speaks for itself. Using pure leather, this wallet does more than just store your money and credit cards - its sleek design adds a heightened vibe of sophistication.Product DetailsBrown leather wallet with two main compartments, has seven card holders, one id card holder, two slip pockets, one pocket with zip closure and embossed branding on the frontMaterial and Care100% LeatherWipe surface with dry clean cloth to avoid dust and stainsDo not store in direct sunlightSizeHeight: 9 cm Width: 11 cm
